ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "plate_number" TEXT /* Vehicle's plate number */,
  "device_num" TEXT /* Device number associated with the vehicle's tracking device */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* The make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* The model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "vin" TEXT /* The Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* The type of fuel the vehicle uses (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* The date the vehicle was registered */,
  "insured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle is insured */,
  "insurance_company" TEXT /* The name of the insurance company */,
  "insurance_expiration_date" TEXT /* The expiration date of the insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES vehicle_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the telemetry data */,
  "location_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the telemetry data */,
  "direction_angle" REAL /* Angle of the vehicle's direction */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "acc_state" INTEGER /* State of the vehicle's acceleration */,
  "right_turn_signals" INTEGER /* Status of right turn signals (1 = on, 0 = off) */,
  "left_turn_signals" INTEGER /* Status of left turn signals (1 = on, 0 = off) */,
  "hand_brake" INTEGER /* State of hand brake (1 = on, 0 = off) */,
  "foot_brake" INTEGER /* State of foot brake (1 = pressed, 0 = not pressed) */,
  "gps_speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle in GPS */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "time_diff" INTEGER /* Time difference from the last log entry */,
  "engine_status" INTEGER /* Indicates the status of the engine (e.g., running, off) */,
  "fuel_level" REAL /* The current fuel level in the vehicle */,
  "battery_voltage" REAL /* The current battery voltage */,
  "oil_pressure" REAL /* The current oil pressure */,
  "coolant_temperature" REAL /* The current coolant temperature */,
  "door_status" TEXT /* The status of the doors (e.g., all closed, front left open) */,
  "seatbelt_status" TEXT /* The status of the seatbelts (e.g., all fastened, driver unfastened) */,
  "engine_hours" INTEGER /* The total engine hours */,
  "air_pressure" REAL /* The current air pressure (for vehicles with air suspension) */,
  "tire_pressure" TEXT /* The current tire pressure for each tire (e.g., 'FL: 35, FR: 35, RL: 35, RR: 35') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the vehicle owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* The address of the vehicle owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the vehicle owner */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* The driver's license number of the vehicle owner */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* The name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the vehicle owner (e.g., manager, driver) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., speeding, sudden stop) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* The severity of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* The status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* The user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* The timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_location" TEXT /* The location where the alert occurred (e.g., '114.546, 26.3234') */,
  "alert_context" TEXT /* Additional context or notes about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
